---
title: ButtonsFactory
subtitle: "keept'em slim"
execute:
  echo: false
---

> Inspired by Svelte ButtonBar & verseRun: todo: style it add input

::: {#inputDiv}
<!-- inputDiv is considered Void-->
:::

> Todo: inlne row + Styling à la svlete
<hr/>

```{ojs}
import {TextInput, ButtonInput, bsTextInput, bsButton, inputWithButton, btnbar} from "./Input_again.js"

viewof bsname = bsTextInput().el;
bsname;

viewof bsbutton = bsButton().el;

viewof bsRow = inputWithButton();
```

```{ojs}
btnbar();
```
